details.productUrlName: 2000 Tom van de Logt Biography Card

customAttributes.description:
(Quarterfinalist)

Quarterfinalist Tom van de Logt posted a perfect 6-0 record during the standard portion of this year's World Championships. The 19-year-old Groesbeek, Holland native was playing a deck that had a big impact on the metagame this year, "Replenish". This deck used cards like Attunement and Frantic Search to put powerful enchantments, such as Parallax Wave and Opalescence, into the graveyard and then used Replensh to put them all back into play at once.
